name: Manage Global Assets (Create Asset)
description: Demonstrates the sequence of functions to create a new global asset (e.g., Scene, NPC) within a Tick.

sequence.action: GM clicks 'Create Asset' and submits asset data (type, name, traits).
Saves the new asset's state to the current Tick.
Cascades the new asset's state forward to all subsequent Ticks.
Refreshes UI to display the new asset.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Clicks 'Create Asset'
    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /ticks/{id}/assets (invokes LI-012)
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO assets...
    Database-->>-AppServer: returns asset_id
    AppServer->>+AppServer: LF-017: Cascade Asset State
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {asset_id: ...}
    Browser->>-GM: Refreshes UI to show new asset
```
